description: Road occupancy rates from 862 sensors on San Francisco Bay Area freeways, measured hourly. GluonTS-format: train/data.json.gz and test/data.json.gz, each line is one JSON object with keys 'target' (array of hourly occupancy values), 'start' (timestamp), 'item_id', 'feat_static_cat'. 862 series, each ~14,036 hours (~17 months). Frequency: 1 hour. Prediction length: 24 hours. Values are already normalized to [0, 1] (occupancy ratios). Strong daily and weekly seasonality. Standard multivariate forecasting benchmark.
target: Forecast hourly road occupancy 24 hours ahead for each sensor. Minimize RMSE as the primary metric. Also report MAE and MASE.
